author: Mika
content: Heads up everyone: the v2.3 update is live!

author: Mika
content: v2.3 adds a dark mode and fixes the crash on Android startup. iOS is unaffected.

author: Leo
content: I can't log in since this morning, it says invalid session.

author: Mika
content: The login bug is caused by expired auth tokens on our side. Workaround: log out fully and log back in. A permanent fix ships tomorrow.

author: Mika
content: Our summer tournament is on Saturday June 13th, 8pm JST. Registration closes Friday June 12th at midnight.

author: Ravi
content: Is there an entry fee for the tournament?

author: Mika
content: No entry fee, it's free to join. Top 3 win in-game currency.

author: Sora
content: Feature request: please add controller support on mobile.

author: Ravi
content: +1 for controller support, would love that.

author: Priya
content: SDK v4 is out. The big change: it now supports streaming responses and drops Node 16 support.

author: Tom
content: What's the rate limit on the free tier?

author: Priya
content: Free tier is 100 requests per minute. The pro tier raises it to 1,000 req/min.

author: Yuki
content: How do I enable streaming with the new SDK?

author: Priya
content: Pass stream=true to the client.generate() call. See the v4 migration guide for details.
